headline: Solar System
description: The Solar System formed ~4.6 billion years ago from a molecular cloud. Sun (99.86% of mass) powers the system via nuclear fusion (H → He). Eight planets: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars (rocky inner), Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune (gas/ice giants). Asteroid belt (Mars-Jupiter), Kuiper belt (beyond Neptune).

citation.name: The New Solar System (2025 Updated Edition)
